evals.name: tailwind-beginner-ja
evals.prompt: 次の GDG 合同勉強会向けに、Tailwind CSS の基礎を学ぶ 60 分のハンズオン codelab を作ってください。対象は HTML/CSS は触ったことがあるけどフレームワーク未経験の大学生。ファイル名は `tailwind-css-basics-workshop/claat.md` です。
evals.expected_output: Complete claat.md, Japanese, ~60 min Duration sum, ≥6 steps with intro/setup/recap, frontmatter present, no `## Step N:` prefix, callouts and code blocks with language tags.
assertions: No `## Step N:` prefix in step headers
All fenced code blocks have language tags

evals.name: gemini-chrome-extension-en
evals.prompt: Draft a 90-minute codelab for our GDG workshop titled 'Build a Chrome Extension with Gemini API'. The extension summarizes the current web page when the user clicks the toolbar icon. Audience already knows JavaScript but hasn't built a Chrome extension before. Cover manifest v3, content scripts, calling the Gemini API from the extension, and packaging. Save the markdown as `gemini-chrome-extension-workshop/claat.md`.
evals.expected_output: Complete claat.md, English, ~90 min Duration sum, ≥6 steps with intro/setup/manifest/content-script/API/packaging/recap, code blocks with language tags and filename headers, callouts present.
assertions: No `## Step N:` prefix in step headers
All fenced code blocks have language tags

evals.name: adk-python-agent-ja
evals.prompt: ADK for Python を使って自作 AI エージェントを構築する 90 分のハンズオン codelab を作って。Python の基礎はわかっている人向け。`adk-python-agent-workshop/claat.md` として書いて。
evals.expected_output: Complete claat.md, Japanese, ~90 min Duration sum, ≥6 steps. Draws on examples/adk-java-getting-started.html patterns adapted for Python (LlmAgent, tools, etc.).
assertions: No `## Step N:` prefix in step headers
All fenced code blocks have language tags
Mentions ADK and a Python install/run step
